name: stock-market
description: Stock price search app — Angular frontend + Go backend

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev:backend: lsof -ti:8080 | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null || true; cd backend && go run main.go
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd frontend && npm install && cd ../backend && go mod tidy
scripts.docker:up: docker compose up -d mongo postgres redis
